title: Ribbed Glass Small Posy Vase for Flowers, 13cm – Mini Sweet Pea Flower Vase for Roses, Tulip, Posy, Daffodil – Small Bud Container Glass Vases for Mothers Day
features: A truly beautiful and elegant clear ribbed vase – This glass flower vase is ideal for displaying flowers and small bouquets. The small vases for table decoration will add a vintage feel to your home.

Round vase is perfect for showing off your flowers – Create a perfect piece of table decor for any occasion. Place the pleated vase in your home with a stunning flower arrangement to add a splash of color and a natural feel.

Place this mini vase in any room – The small glass vase can be used with fresh or faux flowers to create the perfect look. Fill with a single stem for a minimalistic touch or add pebbles to this clear glass vase to use as an elegant candle holder.

Contemporary flower vase glass – Featuring a beautiful shape and ribbed pattern, this decorative vase can be filled with buds, daffodils, posies, peonies, roses, or sweet peas. Perfect for weddings, anniversaries, birthdays, and housewarmings.
Clear vases for flowers make a lovely gift for friends or family – The table vase is 13cm (H) x 10cm (D) with a 6cm opening. Made from strong pressed glass.
Please note this listing is only for the vase. It does not include any flowers.
